name: Cannon
description: A Jakobs assault rifle variant that lobs explosive, gravity-affected shells for the cost of two rounds per trigger pull. Each shot can bounce once before exploding on an enemy or on the next impact, so it favors careful arcs and bank shots over normal hitscan rifle aim.
notes: Its explosion radius is modest, and the long travel after a bounce often helps avoid self-damage. Despite the explosive shots, it still scales with some gun-damage bonuses. It tends to sell for more than expected for its level, its shots can be absorbed as rocket ammo because of the barrel behavior, and it does not spawn in white rarity.
